title: Setup Socket.IO for real-time messaging
description:
## Summary
Integrate Socket.IO with Fastify for real-time messaging.

## Spec Reference
@spec: messaging-system_spec.md
@covers AC-MSG-050, AC-MSG-051, AC-MSG-052, AC-MSG-053

## Implementation Details
- Install @fastify/websocket or socket.io
- Create WebSocket connection handler
- Implement room-based message broadcasting
- Handle authentication via JWT/Firebase token

## Events to Implement
Client → Server:
- join_room, leave_room
- send_message
- typing_start, typing_stop
- mark_read

Server → Client:
- new_message
- user_typing, user_stopped_typing
- unread_update

## Files to Create
- src/core/websocket/socket.ts
- src/core/websocket/handlers/chat.handler.ts

title: Implement chat event creation on job/contract status change
description:
## Summary
Auto-create event messages when job proposal or contract status changes.

## Spec Reference
@spec: messaging-system_spec.md
@covers AC-MSG-021, AC-MSG-022, AC-MSG-023, AC-MSG-024

## Event Types
Job/Proposal:
- PROPOSAL_SUBMITTED, PROPOSAL_ACCEPTED, PROPOSAL_REJECTED

Contract:
- CONTRACT_STARTED, CONTRACT_PAUSED, CONTRACT_COMPLETED

Payment:
- PAYMENT_REQUESTED, PAYMENT_COMPLETED

Milestone:
- MILESTONE_COMPLETED, MILESTONE_APPROVED

## Files to Modify
- src/core/services/hub/contracts/hubContract.service.ts
- src/core/services/hub/proposals/hubProposal.service.ts

title: Create ChatMessage model and schema
description:
## Summary
Create the ChatMessage MongoDB model for storing messages.

## Spec Reference
@spec: messaging-system_spec.md
@covers AC-MSG-010, AC-MSG-012, AC-MSG-013, AC-MSG-014

## Implementation Details
- Create src/core/models/ChatMessage.ts
- Support TEXT, EVENT, FILE message types
- Include files array for attachments
- Include event object for status change events
- Add soft delete support (isDeleted, deletedAt)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AC-MSG-010: Support text up to 10k chars
- [ ] AC-MSG-012: Track sender with userId
- [ ] AC-MSG-013: Timestamp with server time
- [ ] AC-MSG-014: Support message types

## Files to Create
- src/core/models/ChatMessage.ts
- src/core/schemas/chat/chatMessage.schema.ts

description:

## Implementation Details

title: Create ChatMessage service
description:

Create the ChatMessage service for sending and retrieving messages.

## Key Methods

title: Create ChatRoom model and schema
description:
## Summary
Create the ChatRoom MongoDB model with Mongoose.

## Spec Reference
@spec: messaging-system_spec.md
@covers AC-MSG-004, AC-MSG-005, AC-MSG-007

## Implementation Details
- Create src/core/models/ChatRoom.ts
- Fields: contextType, contextId, hubId, members, memberIds, lastMessage, etc.
- Add indexes for efficient querying
- Follow existing model patterns (see Booking.ts)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AC-MSG-004: Support contexts: EXPERTISE, BOOKING, JOB, CONTRACT, GENERAL
- [ ] AC-MSG-005: Link to context entity via contextId and contextType
- [ ] AC-MSG-007: Track members with roles (LEARNER, HUB_MEMBER, HUB_OWNER)

## Files to Create
- src/core/models/ChatRoom.ts
- src/core/schemas/chat/chatRoom.schema.ts

title: Create reusable Chat UI components
description:
## Summary
Extract shared chat UI components for reuse across hub and learner dashboards.

## Components to Create
- ChatMessageBubble - Single message display
- ChatMessageList - Scrollable message list with date separators
- ChatInput - Message input with file attachment
- ChatRoomListItem - Room preview in sidebar
- ChatEventMessage - Display event messages (booking confirmed, etc.)
- TypingIndicator - "User is typing..." display

## Location
projects/app/src/app/shared/components/chat/

## Files to Create
- chat-message-bubble/
- chat-message-list/
- chat-input/
- chat-room-list-item/
- chat-event-message/
- typing-indicator/

title: Refactor Hub Chat component to use real APIs
description:
## Summary
Replace mock data in existing hub chat component with real API calls.

## Current State
- projects/app/src/app/features/hub-dashboard/pages/chats/chats.component.ts
- Has mock data and UI structure
- Uses Angular Signals

## Changes Needed
- Inject ChatService and ChatSocketService
- Replace mockChatRooms with API data
- Connect sendMessage to API
- Add real-time message updates
- Implement proper filtering (API-based)

## Files to Modify
- projects/app/src/app/features/hub-dashboard/pages/chats/chats.component.ts
- projects/app/src/app/features/hub-dashboard/pages/chats/chats.component.html

title: Create POST /chat-rooms endpoint for inquiries
description:
Create API endpoint for creating inquiry chat rooms.

Spec: specs/messaging/messaging-conversation-triggers_spec.md

## Endpoint
POST /chat-rooms
Body: { contextType, contextId }

## Reuse Logic
For inquiry types (HUB, EXPERTISE, EXPERIENCE, JOB):
- Check if room exists for (learnerId + contextType + contextId)
- If exists: return existing room
- If not: create new room

## Files
- src/modules/web/routes/chat/chatRoom.routes.ts
- src/modules/web/controllers/chat/chatRoom.controller.ts

title: Add chat hook to booking.service.create()
description:
Add chat room creation hook to booking.service.ts after booking is saved.

Spec: specs/messaging/messaging-conversation-triggers_spec.md
Location: src/core/services/shared/payments/booking.service.ts:~130

## Implementation
1. After booking.save() (line ~130)
2. Call void this.createBookingChatRoom(booking)
3. Create room with contextType: BOOKING, contextId: bookingId
4. Add system event: 'Booking requested'

## Error Handling
- Use void for non-blocking
- Log errors but don't fail booking

title: Add chat transition hook to hubProposal.service.acceptProposal()
description:
Add chat room transition hook when proposal is accepted.

Spec: specs/messaging/messaging-conversation-triggers_spec.md
Location: src/core/services/hub/proposals/hubProposal.service.ts:~351

## Implementation
1. After proposal.save() with ACCEPTED status (line ~351)
2. Find existing proposal room
3. Update contextType: PROPOSAL → CONTRACT
4. Update contextId: proposalId → contractId
5. Add system event: 'Proposal accepted, contract created'

## Important
- SAME room, just context changes
- All previous messages preserved

title: EPIC: Messaging System Frontend
description:
## Summary
Implement chat UI for Mereka v2 frontend, connecting to backend messaging APIs.

## Components
- Hub Dashboard Chat Inbox (already has basic UI)
- Learner App Chat Inbox (needs to be created)
- Shared Chat Components

## Technology
- Angular 21 with Signals
- Tailwind CSS
- Socket.IO client for real-time

## Reference
- Current basic UI: projects/app/src/app/features/hub-dashboard/pages/chats/
- V1 reference: /home/hira/projects/projects/v1/mereka-web/src/app/pages/chats/

title: Create ChatRoom model
description:
Create ChatRoom mongoose model with contextType, contextId, hubId, learnerId, otherHubId, participants, status fields.

Spec: specs/messaging/messaging-data-models_spec.md

## Context Types
HUB, EXPERTISE, EXPERIENCE, JOB, BOOKING, PROPOSAL, CONTRACT

## Fields
- contextType, contextId, contextSnapshot
- hubId, learnerId (learner-hub), otherHubId (hub-hub)
- participants[], participantIds[]
- lastMessage, messageCount, status

## Indexes
- hubId + contextType + contextId
- learnerId + contextType + contextId

title: Create Message API endpoints
description:
## Summary
Create REST API endpoints for sending and managing messages.

## Spec Reference
@spec: messaging-system_spec.md
@covers AC-MSG-010, AC-MSG-011, AC-MSG-015

## Endpoints
- GET /chat-rooms/:roomId/messages - Get messages (paginated)
- POST /chat-rooms/:roomId/messages - Send message
- DELETE /chat-rooms/:roomId/messages/:messageId - Delete message
- POST /chat-rooms/:roomId/read - Mark as read

## Files to Create
- src/modules/shared/routes/chat/message.routes.ts
- src/modules/shared/controllers/chat/message.controller.ts

title: Create unread tracking service
description:
## Summary
Implement unread count tracking per user per room.

## Spec Reference
@spec: messaging-system_spec.md
@covers AC-MSG-060, AC-MSG-061, AC-MSG-062, AC-MSG-063

## Key Methods
- incrementUnread(roomId, excludeUserId)
- resetUnread(roomId, userId)
- getTotalUnread(userId)
- getUnreadByRoom(userId, roomId)

## Files to Create
- src/core/services/chat/unreadTracking.service.ts

title: EPIC: Messaging System v2
description:
## Summary
Implement complete real-time messaging system for Mereka v2 platform.

Migrating chat functionality from v1 (Firebase/Angular) to v2 (MongoDB/Fastify/Node.js).

## Key Features
- ChatRoom management (multi-context: expertise, booking, job, contract)
- Real-time messaging via WebSocket (Socket.IO)
- Hub inbox with filtering and assignment
- Learner inbox
- Event messages for status changes
- File attachments
- Unread tracking

## Spec
specs/messaging-system_spec.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- AC-MSG-001 through AC-MSG-085 defined in spec
- All P0 criteria must pass before launch

title: EPIC: Messaging System Backend
description:
## Summary
Implement complete real-time messaging backend for Mereka v2 platform.

## Spec Reference
specs/messaging-system_spec.md

## Acceptance Criteria
AC-MSG-001 through AC-MSG-085

## Phases
1. Core Models & APIs (Week 1-2)
2. Hub Inbox Features (Week 3)  
3. WebSocket/Real-time (Week 4)
4. Context Integration (Week 5)
5. Polish & Optimization (Week 6)

title: Add chat event hooks to hubContract.service
description:
Add chat event hooks to contract status change methods.

Spec: specs/messaging/messaging-conversation-triggers_spec.md
Location: src/core/services/hub/contracts/hubContract.service.ts

## Hook Points
1. acceptOffer() ~658: Add 'Contract started' event
2. pauseContract() ~234: Add 'Contract paused' event
3. resumeContract() ~267: Add 'Contract resumed' event
4. cancelContract() ~197: Add 'Contract cancelled' event + close room

## Implementation
- Use void for non-blocking
- Find room by contextType: CONTRACT, contextId: contractId
- Add system message with eventType

title: Create Hub inbox API endpoints
description:
## Summary
Create REST API endpoints for hub chat inbox.

## Spec Reference
@spec: messaging-system_spec.md
@covers AC-MSG-030, AC-MSG-031, AC-MSG-032, AC-MSG-036, AC-MSG-037

## Endpoints
- GET /hub/:hubId/chat-rooms - List rooms with filters
- GET /chat-rooms/:roomId - Get room details
- PATCH /chat-rooms/:roomId/settings - Update user settings
- PATCH /chat-rooms/:roomId/members - Manage members

## Query Parameters
- filter: all | assigned_to_me | unassigned | archived
- search: text search
- page, limit: pagination

## Files to Create
- src/modules/hub/routes/chat/hubChat.routes.ts
- src/modules/hub/controllers/chat/hubChat.controller.ts

title: Create ChatRoomService
description:
Create chatRoom.service.ts with room CRUD operations.

Spec: specs/messaging/messaging-conversation-triggers_spec.md

## Methods
- createRoom(input): Create new chat room
- getOrCreateInquiryRoom(userId, contextType, contextId): For inquiries (reuse if exists)
- updateContext(roomId, contextType, contextId): For proposal→contract transition
- closeRoom(roomId): When contract cancelled

## Reuse Logic
- Inquiry rooms (HUB, EXPERTISE, EXPERIENCE, JOB): Reuse if (learnerId + contextId) exists
- Transaction rooms (BOOKING, PROPOSAL): Always create new

title: Add chat hook to hubProposal.service.createProposal()
description:
Add chat room creation hook to hubProposal.service.ts when proposal is created.

Spec: specs/messaging/messaging-conversation-triggers_spec.md
Location: src/core/services/hub/proposals/hubProposal.service.ts:~69

## Implementation
1. After JobProposal.create() (line ~69)
2. Call void this.createProposalChatRoom(proposal)
3. Create room with contextType: PROPOSAL, contextId: proposalId
4. Add system event: 'Proposal submitted'

## Hub-to-Hub Chat
- hubId = job.hubId (client hub)
- otherHubId = proposal.expertHubId (expert hub)

title: Create ChatRoom service with CRUD operations
description:
## Summary
Create the core ChatRoom service for managing chat rooms.

## Spec Reference
@spec: messaging-system_spec.md
@covers AC-MSG-001, AC-MSG-006, AC-MSG-008

## Implementation Details
- getOrCreateRoom: Find existing or create new
- Prevent duplicates for same context
- Auto-add hub owner on creation
- Member management functions

## Key Methods
- getOrCreateRoom(contextType, contextId, hubId, initiatorId)
- findRoomsByHub(hubId, filters)
- findRoomsByUser(userId)
- addMember(roomId, member)
- removeMember(roomId, userId)
- updateLastMessage(roomId, messageId, preview)

## Files to Create
- src/core/services/chat/chatRoom.service.ts

title: Create WebSocket service for real-time chat
description:
## Summary
Create Angular service for Socket.IO connection and events.

## Features
- Connect/disconnect with auth token
- Join/leave rooms
- Listen for new messages
- Emit typing indicators
- Handle reconnection

## Signals/Observables
- connected$: Signal<boolean>
- newMessage$: Observable<ChatMessage>
- userTyping$: Observable<TypingEvent>
- unreadUpdate$: Observable<UnreadUpdate>

## Files to Create
- projects/app/src/app/core/services/chat-socket.service.ts

title: Add chat entry point from Expertise detail page
description:
## Summary
Add "Message Host" button on expertise detail page to start conversation.

## User Flow
1. Learner views expertise
2. Clicks "Message Host" / "Ask a Question"
3. Opens chat modal or navigates to chat
4. Backend creates/finds ChatRoom with EXPERTISE context

## Files to Modify
- Expertise detail component (find and modify)
- Add ChatService injection
- Create room or navigate to existing
